raw_title: Updating Public Value: How Journalists Understand Their Societal Role in the Context of Digital Platforms
title_en: Updating Public Value: How Journalists Understand Their Societal Role in the Context of Digital Platforms
title_zh: 更新公共价值：记者如何在数字平台背景下理解其社会角色
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨记者在数字平台时代如何看待自己的社会角色。随着社交媒体和在线新闻平台变得越来越重要，记者们需要重新思考他们为公众提供什么价值。研究关注记者如何适应这些变化，以及他们如何定义自己在现代社会中的责任。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how journalists view their societal role in the age of digital platforms. As social media and online news platforms become increasingly important, journalists need to rethink what value they provide to the public. The study focuses on how journalists adapt to these changes and how they define their responsibilities in modern society.
research_direction_zh: 新闻职业研究，关注数字转型背景下新闻工作者的角色认知、职业认同和公共价值重构。
research_direction_en: Journalism profession research, focusing on role perception, professional identity, and public value reconstruction of journalists in the context of digital transformation.
